contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Consolidated DAO-client integration fix list (oracle + capoeira) handed to Sophia at thread 3
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/368
  
  Details:
  Consolidated all outstanding @truesight_dao/dao-client integration issues into one coordination punch-list (DAO_CLIENT_INTEGRATION_FIXES.md, agentic_ai_context PR #368) and handed it to Sophia at thread 3 as the single tracker. Issue 1 (BLOCKER, topic 1638): republish @1.0.1 fixing the browser global (window.DaoClient must BE the class, not the module namespace — the bug that broke oracle prod twice) plus a RUNTIME smoke test that loads the actual bundle (node --check can't catch an API-shape mismatch). Issue 2 (oracle, reverted to working inline): re-do the CDN adoption against @1.0.1 with correct load order, preserving canonical-signing + 3-state identity UX + SW kill-switch. Issue 3 (capoeira, parked): swap practice-event-submit.js generic helpers, keep capoeira-specific logic inline. Captured the shared Definition of Done for every consumer swap (depend on @1.0.1 + verify unpkg 200 in-PR, runtime test, fix load order, map-before-delete, open-PR-don't-auto-merge, Generated-by trailer) and the sequence (Issue 1 unblocks 2 and 3, which then run in parallel as reviewed PRs). Refreshed Sophia's clone; she confirmed, restated the plan, and reported she's on Issue 1 with 2 & 3 parked.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
